If you’re looking to fill your week with even more Halloween fun 🎃👻, there’s still time ⏰ to enjoy other local events! 🍂🍁 You can check out the Boo Fest at @msichicago for hands-on spooky science activities 🔬🧪 tonight, the Boo-seum Bash at the @naturemuseum 🐍🍃, the Spooktacular Science at the @fieldmuseum 🦖💀, or head to BUBBLEWEEN 🎈at @bubblesacademy for costumes, music 🎶, and plenty of fun! 🎉👻 These are great options to keep the Halloween magic 🎃 alive with your little ones 🧙‍♀️🧡✨!
